📈 MARTINGALE CALCULATOR
Plan your full bet sequence · Track cumulative exposure · Know your exact limits
⚙ SETUP YOUR SEQUENCE
CURRENCY
Select the currency for your bet amounts
ODD
Decimal multiplier paid when your bet wins  e.g. 2.00 means bet ×2 payout
BASE BET
MINIMUM BET
Your starting stake — the sequence always resets to this amount after a win
₦
AVR. PROFIT
MIN. PROFIT
Minimum profit you want guaranteed every time any bet in the sequence wins
₦
TRADING POWER
How many rounds the sequence runs — set any number you want
1 roundSAFE ◄─── AGGRESSIVE20 rounds
📈
Ready to calculate your sequence
Fill in the fields on the left and your full bet sequence table will appear here
ROUNDS
MIN. PROFIT / WIN
TOTAL EXPOSURE
FINAL ROUND BET
📈 MARTINGALE EXPOSURE MAP
Bet size vs cumulative bankroll risk
📋  FULL BET SEQUENCE
# SITUATION BET AMOUNT TOTAL STAKED
(sum if lost every round)		 PROFIT IF WIN RISK
TOTAL EXPOSURE  —  IF ALL ROUNDS LOSE Win at any step to keep profit
✓ HOW TO USE:  Place Round 1 first. If it wins, collect your profit and restart from Round 1. If it loses, move to Round 2 — the bet is already sized to recover Round 1's loss plus still deliver your target profit. Continue down the table until you win. Every single row is profitable when it wins.
🛡 BACK BET CALCULATOR
Dual-bet recovery system · Recovery Bet chases profit · Back Bet protects your money
✓
RECOVERY BET WINS
Covers all previous round losses + both current bets + your target profit. Full recovery with guaranteed profit.
↔
BACK BET WINS
Returns exactly the total staked in this round only (Recovery + Back Bet). No profit, but no cumulative loss either.
✗
BOTH LOSE
Both bets lost. Move to the next round — the new Recovery Bet is already sized to recover everything including this round.
⚙ SETUP YOUR DUAL-BET SEQUENCE
CURRENCY
All bet amounts will be shown in this currency
RECOVERY BET ODD
Odd for the bet that wins you profit + recovers losses
BACK BET ODD
Odd for the backup bet that returns your round stake only
BASE BET
MINIMUM BET
Starting Recovery Bet amount — the sequence resets to this after any win
₦
AVR. PROFIT
MIN. PROFIT
Minimum net profit you receive whenever the Recovery Bet wins
₦
TRADING POWER
Number of rounds in the calculation — set any number you want
1 roundSAFE ◄── AGGRESSIVE15 rounds
🛡
Ready to calculate your dual-bet sequence
Fill in the fields on the left — your full round-by-round table will appear here
ROUNDS
PROFIT / WIN
BACK BET WIN
MAX EXPOSURE
FINAL REC. BET
📋  ROUND-BY-ROUND BET SEQUENCE
# SITUATION 🎯 RECOVERY BET 🛡 BACK BET 📊 ROUND TOTALS
BET IF WIN: PROFIT BET IF WIN: RETURN ROUND STAKE TOTAL STAKED
(if both lose every round)
WORST CASE — ALL ROUNDS LOSE
💡 STRATEGY TIP:  Place Recovery Bet and Back Bet simultaneously each round. If the Recovery Bet wins → collect profit and restart from Round 1. If the Back Bet wins → you get back exactly what you staked this round, no profit but losses don't carry forward. Only if both lose do you move to the next round with the larger stakes.
🎲 ARBITRARY CALCULATOR
Multi-odd recovery system · Bet on 2–6 odds simultaneously · Equal profit whichever odd wins
🎯
ANY ODD WINS
Whichever of your selected odds wins, the payout is sized to return all previous losses plus your exact target profit.
⚖
EQUAL PROFIT
Each odd gets a different stake — higher odds need less money, lower odds need more — but all deliver the same profit.
🔄
ALL LOSE → NEXT ROUND
If every odd loses, the next round's bets are recalculated to recover the full combined loss plus profit.
⚙ SETUP YOUR MULTI-ODD SEQUENCE
CURRENCY
All bet amounts shown in this currency
ODDS
Add 2 to 6 decimal odds — each will get its own stake
2 ODDS
BASE BET
MIN. BET STAKE
Minimum stake per individual bet — no single odd's stake will fall below this amount
₦
AVR. PROFIT
MIN. PROFIT
The profit you receive whichever odd wins — same amount for all
₦
TRADING POWER
Number of rounds in the calculation — how far the sequence extends
1 roundSAFE ◄── AGGRESSIVE15 rounds
🎲
Ready to calculate your multi-odd sequence
Add your odds and fill in the fields — the full round-by-round table will appear here
ROUNDS
PROFIT / WIN
MAX EXPOSURE
ODDS IN PLAY
📋  ROUND-BY-ROUND BET SEQUENCE
💡 STRATEGY TIP:  Place all bets simultaneously each round. Any single win gives you your target profit and resets the sequence to Round 1. Each odd has a different stake — higher odds need a smaller bet, lower odds need a larger one — but all pay the same profit when they win. Only when every odd in a round loses do you advance to the next round.
🧮 MANUAL ARBITRAGE CHECKER
Select a sport, enter the best odds you found from different bookmakers, and see instantly if the market is under 100%
⚽
SELECT SPORT + MARKET
Switch between football, basketball, tennis, esports, and more. Each market loads the correct outcome structure automatically.
🏷️
ENTER BEST BOOKMAKER ODDS
Type the bookmaker name and its best odd for every outcome so you can compare manual finds before placing any bet.
📉
CHECK THE EDGE
If the combined implied probability drops below 100%, the calculator shows your stake split, guaranteed payout, and profit margin.
⚙ BUILD YOUR MANUAL ARB
SPORT
Choose the sport first so the calculator can load suitable market types
MARKET
Pick the exact market you want to compare
CURRENCY
The total bankroll will be split across all outcomes in this currency
TOTAL STAKE
BANKROLL TO SPLIT
Enter the total amount you want the calculator to distribute across all outcomes
₦
OUTCOMES + BOOKMAKERS
Enter the best available odd you found for each outcome
0 OUTCOMES
Tip: compare only the best price per outcome. One weak odd can push the combined book over 100% and remove the arbitrage edge.

CALCULATION PDF ARCHIVE
Shared auto-generated calculator reports · Download by date/time · Admin-only delete
How this works
1. Auto generation: Every valid calculation creates a branded PDF report automatically.
2. Shared archive: Reports are visible to all users (logged-in and guests) with date and time labels.
3. Access control: Reports are read-only for users. Only verified admins can delete.

💰 MARTINGALE CONFIGURATION
How it works: Start with base bet. On loss, double the stake. On win, collect profit and reset to base bet.
Formula: Stake = Base Bet × 2^(consecutive losses)

⚠ REQUIRES CLOUDFLARE WORKER PROXY
The Bet9ja API requires a session cookie that CORS proxies can't forward.
Fix: Deploy a free Cloudflare Worker in 2 minutes:
1. Go to workers.cloudflare.com → Sign up free → Create Worker
2. Paste the worker code (copy from console: console.log(window._workerCode))
3. Deploy → copy the worker URL → paste below

HOW TO USE KUROSOFT CASINO
A full breakdown of every tool and feature on the platform
🧮 Calculators 📡 Live Scanners 🎯 Predictions 👑 VIP Features ✈️ Crash Analytics
🧮 Betting Calculators
📊
Martingale Calculator
Builds full round-by-round martingale sequences with exact exposure, risk levels, and stop-point awareness before you place a live trade.
🔄
Martingale Calculator
Maps out your full Martingale sequence before you start. Enter your base stake, odds, and how many rounds you want — it shows the exact stake per round, total exposure, and bankroll needed. Tells you exactly when the numbers stop adding up.
🛡️
Back-Bet Recovery System
Two-bet system: Recovery Bet goes at higher odds for profit, Back Bet goes at lower odds as protection. If the recovery bet wins, you profit. If it loses, the back bet covers you. Enter your target profit and odds — it works out the exact amounts for both bets.
⚖️
Arbitrary Calculator (Multi-Odd)
Splits your stake across 2 to 6 different odds so you get equal profit no matter which one wins. Enter your total stake and all the odds and it distributes the money evenly. Good for hedging across multiple outcomes.
📡 Live Scanners & Data
💹
Arbitrage Scanner
Scans live odds from 40+ bookmakers across Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, Champions League, and NBA. When different bookmakers have odds that create a guaranteed profit, it catches it straight away. Shows you which bookmaker, how much to stake, and your exact profit. Nigerian bookmakers (SportyBet, Bet9ja, BetPawa) are included. Filters by sport, arb type, or bookmaker. Refreshes every 2 minutes.
🔴
49ja Live Feed
Live results from the Bet9ja 49 Balls lottery as they come in. Shows each draw with colour breakdown (Red/Green/Blue), Hi/Mid/Lo classification, total, and ball frequency. Watch results land in real time and spot patterns as they form.
📊 49ja Statistics & Indicator
📊
49ja Statistics
Deep breakdown of all historical 49ja draws — 1,400+ and growing. Four market views: HI/LO, Total Colour, BET49 Numbers, and Rainbow. Each one has losing streak tables, gap analysis, prediction engine, and self-evaluation tracking. Stats update live as new draws come in from the Live Feed.
🔔
49ja Streak Indicator VIP
The tool that makes 49ja trading worth doing. Set your own losing streak thresholds for each market — when a market hits your number (e.g. HI hasn't come up in 17 draws), you get an instant Telegram alert. The streak data feeds directly from the Statistics engine so it's always accurate. Found in the INDICATOR tab on the 49ja Statistics page. VIP only.
🎯 Predictions
⚽
Football Predictions
Upcoming fixtures across Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, and Champions League. Each match shows win chances for Home/Draw/Away based on odds from multiple bookmakers. Includes 1X2 and GG/NG picks with confidence ratings (Strong/Moderate/Lean). Nigerian bookmaker odds shown where available. Hit "+ Pick" to log it to your history.
🏀
NBA Predictions
Upcoming NBA games with win chances based on live odds from 40+ bookmakers. Moneyline picks with confidence ratings and probability bars. Pulls the next 3 days of fixtures automatically. Hit "+ Pick" to log and track your record.
📋
Prediction History
Tracks every prediction you've saved. Real scores are fetched automatically after matches finish to mark your pick as Win or Loss. Shows your overall hit rate, total wins/losses, and pending picks. Filter by status or sport. Use the manual Win/Loss buttons if auto-scoring isn't available. This is your personal track record — use it to see what's actually working.
🎱
49ja VIP Predictions VIP
Hot numbers, colour picks, total picks, and suggested ball selections for the next 49ja draw. Uses Momentum and Previous-Gap strategies running on historical draw data. Updates every draw. VIP only.
🎰 Lottery Analytics
🎰
Lottery Lab
Covers UK 49s, Ghana Lotto, US Powerball, Mega Millions, EuroMillions, China Welfare, SA Powerball, Nigeria Lotto, and more. Uses frequency analysis, gap patterns, and Markov chain models to surface number trends. View hot/cold stats and generate picks. Export to PDF.
✈️ Crash Game Analytics
✈️
Aviator Analytics
Connects to a live Aviator game scraper to pull real multiplier results. Shows distribution charts, streak breakdowns, and cash-out simulations. Enter your VPS scraper URL to connect, or type in multipliers manually. Track multiplier frequencies, spot streaks, and test different cash-out targets.
📈 Strategy & Data
▷
Strategy Backtester
Test any staking system against historical data before touching real money. Pick a system (flat stake, percentage, Martingale, Fibonacci), set your bankroll, and run hundreds of simulated bets. Shows your P&L, max drawdown, win rate, and ROI. Find out whether a strategy actually holds up before you commit.
👑 VIP Subscription
👑
All Access Plan
Single All Access plan: ₦75,000/month. It unlocks all VIP feature services, bots, and apps together in one subscription, including 49ja VIP Prediction, Crash VIP Prediction, Arb Scanner, 49ja Trader App, and BC Crash Auto Trader. Subscribe from your Profile page. Payments go through Flutterwave. Cancel whenever.
🎬 Media & Community
🎬
Videos & Shorts
Tutorials, tips, and strategy content from the KuroSoft YouTube channel. Browse all videos or filter by Videos/Shorts. New content also goes out on the Telegram channel. Subscribe to keep up.
👤 Account
👤
Account & Profile
Create an account to sync your data across devices. Your prediction history, saved picks, and settings are all stored in the cloud. Sign up with email and password. Your profile page shows your subscription status, betting history, and — if you're an admin — the dashboard with live visitors and user management.
🌍
Language Translation
Supports 25+ languages. Click the language dropdown in the top bar to translate the whole interface. English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Italian, Russian, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Hindi, Swahili, Yoruba, Hausa, Igbo, and more.
💡 Tips
🎯
Start with Arbitrage
Even 1–2% arbs stack up when you're doing them consistently. It's the closest thing to guaranteed money on this platform.
📊
Track Everything
Use Prediction History. Your hit rate over 100+ picks is the only honest way to know if your approach is working.
💰
Use Disciplined Staking
Always set your maximum exposure before opening a sequence so one bad run cannot wipe your bankroll.
🔄
Backtest Before You Bet
Never use a staking system with real money before running it through the Backtester. The data doesn't lie.
🔔
Set Up Streak Alerts
If you're trading 49ja, the Streak Indicator is the most important tool on the platform. Set your thresholds and let the alerts tell you when to move. VIP only.
📱
Stay Connected
Telegram · YouTube — daily tips, strategies, and platform updates.

BC Crash Auto Trader
v1.8.3 · Android APK · BC.Game · Build EAS-22 (versionCode 22)
NEW • v1.8.3
A fully automated BC.Game crash trading bot with two focused strategy engines — Classic+Trenball and Trend. v1.8.3 fixes authentication stability issues and improves session reliability for all users.
WHAT'S INSIDE
✅ 2 Core Strategy Engines

LIVE
A fully automated live sports betting bot that runs on your Android device. It scrapes live betPawa odds via an on-device WebView, picks the best Goal/Goal or Over 2.5 goals opportunity, places bets automatically, and uses a 2× rollover recovery staking strategy to recover any losses.

📋 How to Install
1. One All Access subscription unlocks all trading tools below
2. Download the APK file using the red button
3. Open the downloaded file on your Android phone
4. If prompted, enable "Install from unknown sources" in settings
5. Tap "Install" and wait for it to complete
6. Open the app, sign in with your KuroSoft account, and start trading
📱 Requirements
• Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer
• Active BC.Game account with balance
• KuroSoft Hub account (same login used in app)
• Active All Access subscription
• Stable internet connection
• At least 100MB free storage

Where betting meets data science

KuroSoft Casino is a betting analytics platform built for people who take trading seriously. This isn't about luck — it's about data, probability, and making informed decisions.

I built this platform to give you the same kind of tools that professional sports traders use: martingale planners, back-bet recovery systems, arbitrage scanning across 40+ bookmakers, lottery prediction engines, and real-time market data — all in one place.

LEGAL & PRIVACY
Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy & Disclaimer
⚠️ Disclaimer

KuroSoft Casino is an analytical tool only. We do not operate as a bookmaker, gambling operator, or financial advisor. All predictions, analyses, and recommendations are for informational and educational purposes only.

Betting and gambling involve significant financial risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Predictions are based on historical data and mathematical probability.

You are solely responsible for your betting decisions and any financial losses incurred. KuroSoft Casino, its creator, and affiliates accept no liability for any losses arising from use of this platform.

If you or someone you know has a gambling problem, please seek help from a professional gambling support organization in your country.

📋 Terms of Service

1. Acceptance. By accessing KuroSoft Casino, you agree to these terms.

2. Service. KuroSoft Casino provides betting analytics tools, statistical models, and educational content. We are not a gambling operator.

3. Accounts. You are responsible for your account credentials and must provide accurate registration information. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms.

4. Acceptable Use. Do not use the platform for illegal purposes, hack or exploit the system, resell our tools, or create multiple accounts.

5. Intellectual Property. All content, code, algorithms, and designs are the property of Tabuku Kuro / KuroSoft.

6. Liability. KuroSoft Casino is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for losses resulting from use of our tools.

7. Changes. We may update these terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

🔒 Privacy Policy

Data Collected: Name, username, email, phone, address when you register. Analytics: pages visited, time spent, device info, browser type.

Usage: To provide and improve the service and understand how features are being used.

Storage: Secured via Google Firebase with encryption in transit. Passwords are hashed by Firebase Authentication.

Third Parties: We do not sell personal information. We use Firebase (Google) and Cloudflare for infrastructure.

Your Rights: Request access to or deletion of your data by contacting the administrator.

🍪 Cookie Policy

Essential: Firebase authentication tokens for login.

Preferences: Language selection and theme settings in localStorage.

Analytics: Anonymous usage data to improve the platform.

You can clear cookies via browser settings. Clearing essential cookies will log you out. By using KuroSoft Casino, you consent to our use of cookies.
